title: Decisions, Pattern Matching, and Iteration · Language Clinic: Python Loop Control
summary: Route support requests through priority rules, repeated records, and changed data conditions. Planned artifact: Add and verify the python loop control increment in a support-request routing engine. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Use break, continue, loop else, and nested-loop extraction without skipping required work or hiding termination.
Use enumerate and zip to preserve index or parallel-sequence meaning without manual counter drift.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
